variables.name: template
variables.defaultValue:
iconPaths
	.map(
		(path) =>
			`<vr-kit-icon [path]="'${path}'" [color]="color" [size]="'36px'" [tooltipText]="'${path}'"></vr-kit-icon>`
	)
	.join(' ')
